_meta.provenance: TASK-210 multi-retailer expansion (cleaned). Shufersal pool (37 products): frozen from cereals_frontend_v1.json / run_cereals_008. New retailer pool (1 net-new product): run_cereals_multiretailer_001 — Carrefour. Source: Israeli price-transparency feeds (il_prices) + OFF candidate panels (EDPG). BSIP0 filters applied (F1-F4). 19 granola-subpool products removed (belong to /granolas corpus — 18 already in granola_frontend_v1.json; 1 orphan גרנולה בתוספת חלבון pending granola pipeline). 7 cross-retailer duplicate IDs removed (kept shufersal baseline). Score range: 32-75. Grade dist: B:6 C:15 D:16 E:1. Additionally removed 4 out-of-scope products: Fitness Thin (wafer), דייסת דגנים מעורבים (porridge), קורנפלקס (no-image generic), מארז קורנפלקס של אלופים (bundle pack).
